name: speckyai-monorepo
description: SpeckyAI monorepo. Use root package-lock.json only; run npm install from repo root.

scripts.preinstall: node -e "var fs=require('fs'),p=require('path');var cwd=process.cwd();var lock=p.join(cwd,'package-lock.json');var pkg=p.join(cwd,'package.json');if(!fs.existsSync(lock)||!fs.existsSync(pkg))process.exit(0);var j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(pkg,'utf8'));if(!j.workspaces){console.error('SpeckyAI: Run npm install from repo root (where package-lock.json is): c:\\Users\\lorai\\Projects\\SpeckyAI');process.exit(1);}"
